en: "Brothers and fathers, hear the defense that I now make before you."
zh: “各位父老弟兄，請聽聽我現在對你們的申辯。”

en: And when they heard that he was addressing them in the Hebrew language, they became even more quiet. And he said:
zh: 他們聽見保羅用希伯來語說話，就更加安靜了。保羅說：

en: "I am a Jew, born in Tarsus in Cilicia, but brought up in this city, educated at the feet of Gamaliel according to the strict manner of the law of our fathers, being zealous for God as all of you are this day.
zh: “我是猶太人，生在基利家的大數，在城裡長大，按照我們祖宗律法的嚴格要求，在迦瑪列門下受教，我為 神熱心，好像你們大家今天一樣。

en: I persecuted this Way to the death, binding and delivering to prison both men and women,
zh: 我曾經迫害信奉這道的人直至死地，把男男女女都捆綁起來，送進監獄，

en: as the high priest and the whole council of elders can bear me witness. From them I received letters to the brothers, and I journeyed toward Damascus to take those also who were there and bring them in bonds to Jerusalem to be punished.
zh: 這是大祭司和全公議會都可以給我作證的。我也從他們那裡得到了寫給眾弟兄的信，就去大馬士革，要把那裡的人捆綁起來，帶到耶路撒冷接受懲罰。

en: "As I was on my way and drew near to Damascus, about noon a great light from heaven suddenly shone around me.
zh: “約在正午，當我走近大馬士革的時候，忽然有大光從天上向我四面照射，

en: And I fell to the ground and heard a voice saying to me, 'Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me?'
zh: 我仆倒在地上，聽見有聲音對我說：‘掃羅，掃羅，你為甚麼迫害我？’

en: And I answered, 'Who are you, Lord?' And he said to me, 'I am Jesus of Nazareth, whom you are persecuting.'
zh: 我回答：‘主啊，你是誰？’他說：‘我就是你所迫害的拿撒勒人耶穌。’

en: Now those who were with me saw the light but did not understand the voice of the one who was speaking to me.
zh: 跟我在一起的人，只看見那光，卻聽不清楚那位對我說話的聲音。

en: And I said, 'What shall I do, Lord?' And the Lord said to me, 'Rise, and go into Damascus, and there you will be told all that is appointed for you to do.'
zh: 我說：‘主啊，我應當作甚麼呢？’主說：‘起來，進大馬士革去，在那裡有人會把指定給你作的一切事告訴你。’

en: And since I could not see because of the brightness of that light, I was led by the hand by those who were with me, and came into Damascus.
zh: 因為那光太強烈，我的眼睛就瞎了，跟我在一起的人就牽著我的手，進了大馬士革。

en: "And one Ananias, a devout man according to the law, well spoken of by all the Jews who lived there,
zh: “有一個人名叫亞拿尼亞的，他是一個虔誠而遵守律法的人，當地所有的猶太人都稱讚他。

en: came to me, and standing by me said to me, 'Brother Saul, receive your sight.' And at that very hour I received my sight and saw him.
zh: 他來見我，站在我旁邊，對我說：‘掃羅弟兄，你現在可以看見了。’我立刻往上一看，看見了他。

en: And he said, 'The God of our fathers appointed you to know his will, to see the Righteous One and to hear a voice from his mouth;
zh: 他又說：‘我們祖先的 神選派了你，讓你明白他的旨意，看見那義者，聽見他口中的聲音。

en: for you will be a witness for him to everyone of what you have seen and heard.
zh: 因為你要把所看見所聽見的，向萬人為他作見證。

en: And now why do you wait? Rise and be baptized and wash away your sins, calling on his name.'
zh: 現在你為甚麼還耽擱呢？起來受洗，求告他的名，洗淨你的罪吧。’

en: "When I had returned to Jerusalem and was praying in the temple, I fell into a trance
zh: “後來，我回到耶路撒冷，在殿裡禱告的時候，魂遊象外，

en: and saw him saying to me, 'Make haste and get out of Jerusalem quickly, because they will not accept your testimony about me.'
zh: 看見主對我說：‘你要快快離開耶路撒冷，因為你為我作的見證，他們是不會接受的。’

en: And I said, 'Lord, they themselves know that in one synagogue after another I imprisoned and beat those who believed in you.
zh: 我說：‘主啊，他們知道我曾把信你的人監禁起來，又在各會堂拷打他們，

en: And when the blood of Stephen your witness was being shed, I myself was standing by and approving and watching over the garments of those who killed him.'
zh: 並且你的見證人司提反受害流血的時候，我也親自在場，表示同意，並且為殺他的人看守衣服。’

en: And he said to me, 'Go, for I will send you far away to the Gentiles.'"
zh: 他對我說：‘你走吧，我要派你到遠方的外族人那裡去。’”

en: Up to this word they listened to him. Then they raised their voices and said, "Away with such a fellow from the earth! For he should not be allowed to live."
zh: 眾人聽見他說到這句話，就高聲說：“這樣的人應該從地上除掉，不應該活著！”

en: And as they were shouting and throwing off their cloaks and flinging dust into the air,
zh: 大家正在喊叫著，拋擲衣服，向空中揚灰撒土的時候，

en: the tribune ordered him to be brought into the barracks, saying that he should be examined by flogging, to find out why they were shouting against him like this.
zh: 千夫長下令把保羅帶到營樓去，吩咐人用鞭子拷問他，要知道群眾為甚麼這樣向他喊叫。

en: But when they had stretched him out for the whips, Paul said to the centurion who was standing by, "Is it lawful for you to flog a man who is a Roman citizen and uncondemned?"
zh: 士兵正用皮帶綁他的時候，保羅對站在旁邊的百夫長說：“你們鞭打一個還沒有定罪的羅馬公民，是合法的嗎？”

en: When the centurion heard this, he went to the tribune and said to him, "What are you about to do? For this man is a Roman citizen."
zh: 百夫長聽了，就去報告千夫長，說：“這個人是羅馬公民，你要怎麼辦呢？”

en: So the tribune came and said to him, "Tell me, are you a Roman citizen?" And he said, "Yes."
zh: 千夫長就來問保羅：“告訴我，你是羅馬公民嗎？”他說：“是的。”

en: The tribune answered, "I bought this citizenship for a large sum." Paul said, "But I am a citizen by birth."
zh: 千夫長說：“我花了一大筆錢，才取得羅馬籍。”保羅說：“我生下來就是羅馬公民。”

en: So those who were about to examine him withdrew from him immediately, and the tribune also was afraid, for he realized that Paul was a Roman citizen and that he had bound him.
zh: 於是那些要拷問他的人，立刻離開他走了。千夫長既知道他是羅馬公民，又因捆綁過他，就害怕起來。

en: But on the next day, desiring to know the real reason why he was being accused by the Jews, he unbound him and commanded the chief priests and all the council to meet, and he brought Paul down and set him before them.
zh: 第二天，千夫長為要知道猶太人控告保羅的真相，就解開他，召集了祭司長和公議會全體在一起，把保羅帶下來，叫他站在他們面前。
